# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - release
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_DEPTH: "0"

default:
  image: alpine:3.19
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git curl jq
    - git config --global user.name "gitlab-ci"
    - git config --global user.email "gitlab-ci@example.com"

prepare_mr_metadata:
  stage: prepare
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" ]; then
        MR_API_URL="$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests/$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID"
        MR_JSON="$(curl --silent --show-error --header "JOB-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" "$MR_API_URL")"
        MR_TITLE="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.title // ""')"
        MR_DESCRIPTION="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.description // ""')"
      else
        MR_TITLE="${CI_COMMIT_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
        MR_DESCRIPTION="${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE:-No merge request description available}"
      fi
      SAFE_MR_TITLE="$(printf '%s' "$MR_TITLE" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/-/g' | sed 's/-\+/-/g' | sed 's/^-//;s/-$//' | cut -c1-60)"
      {
        echo "MR_TITLE<<EOF"
        printf '%s\n' "$MR_TITLE"
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_DESCRIPTION<<EOF"
        printf '%s\n' "$MR_DESCRIPTION"
        echo "EOF"
        echo "SAFE_MR_TITLE=$SAFE_MR_TITLE"
      } > mr.env
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: mr.env

build_app:
  stage: build
  needs:
    - job: prepare_mr_metadata
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - echo "Building for feature: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Release notes source:"
    - printf '%s\n' "$MR_DESCRIPTION"
    - BUILD_MESSAGE="build: ${MR_TITLE}"
    - git checkout "$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME"
    - git commit --allow-empty -m "$BUILD_MESSAGE" -m "$MR_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Sending build notification"
    - |
      cat > notification.json <<EOF
      {
        "project": "$CI_PROJECT_PATH",
        "pipeline_id": "$CI_PIPELINE_ID",
        "commit": "$CI_COMMIT_SHA",
        "merge_request_title": $(jq -Rs . <<< "$MR_TITLE"),
        "merge_request_description": $(jq -Rs . <<< "$MR_DESCRIPTION"),
        "message": $(jq -Rs . <<< "Build completed for $MR_TITLE")
      }
      EOF
    - cat notification.json

release_notes:
  stage: release
  needs:
    - job: prepare_mr_metadata
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - RELEASE_TAG="release-${CI_PIPELINE_IID}-${SAFE_MR_TITLE}"
    - |
      {
        echo "# Release $RELEASE_TAG"
        echo
        echo "## Feature"
        echo "$MR_TITLE"
        echo
        echo "## Notes"
        printf '%s\n' "$MR_DESCRIPTION"
      } > release_notes.md
    - cat release_notes.md
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - release_notes.md

deploy_app:
  stage: deploy
  needs:
    - job: prepare_mr_metadata
      artifacts: true
    - job: release_notes
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - DEPLOY_TAG="deploy-${CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME:-prod}-${CI_PIPELINE_IID}-${SAFE_MR_TITLE}"
    - echo "Deploying feature: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Using deployment tag: $DEPLOY_TAG"
    - echo "Automatic release notes:"
    - cat release_notes.md
    - |
      cat > deploy_notification.json <<EOF
      {
        "environment": "${CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME:-production}",
        "deployment_tag": "$DEPLOY_TAG",
        "merge_request_title": $(jq -Rs . <<< "$MR_TITLE"),
        "merge_request_description": $(jq -Rs . <<< "$MR_DESCRIPTION"),
        "release_notes_file": "release_notes.md"
      }
      EOF
    - cat deploy_notification.json
    - git tag -f "$DEPLOY_TAG" "$CI_COMMIT_SHA"
    - git push -f "https://gitlab-ci-token:${CI_JOB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git" "$DEPLOY_TAG"
  environment:
    name: production
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID'
